text.title: Language-Specific Directory Layouts
text.summary: Reference directory trees for Python/Django, TypeScript/React, and Go after applying decomposition patterns.

example.code: app/ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ models/ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ __init__.py # Export all models в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ user.py # User model only в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ profile.py # Profile model only в”њв”Ђв”Ђ services/ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ __init__.py в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ user_service.py # User business logic (no HTTP types) в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ auth_service.py # Auth business logic в”њв”Ђв”Ђ views/ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ __init__.py в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ user_views.py # Thin: deserialize -> service -> serialize в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ auth_views.py в”њв”Ђв”Ђ serializers/ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ user_serializers.py в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ auth_serializers.py в””в”Ђв”Ђ tests/ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test_models/ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test_services/ # Test services without HTTP layer в””в”Ђв”Ђ test_views/
example.note: Services imported by views; views import nothing from tests. Circular imports are structurally impossible.

example.code: src/ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ components/ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ui/ # shadcn primitives (Button, Card, etc.) в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ features/ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ Dashboard/ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Dashboard.tsx # Composition only (<50 lines) в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ DashboardHeader.tsx в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ DashboardMetrics.tsx в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ hooks/ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ useDashboardData.ts в”њв”Ђв”Ђ hooks/ # Shared hooks в”њв”Ђв”Ђ services/ # API service functions в”њв”Ђв”Ђ stores/ # State management в”њв”Ђв”Ђ types/ # Interface definitions (Extract Types) в””в”Ђв”Ђ utils/ # Pure utility functions
example.note: Parent Dashboard.tsx renders children only; data fetching lives in hooks/. Each child <100 lines.

example.code: internal/ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ domain/ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ user/ в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ user.go # Entity + value objects в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ repository.go # Interface (no implementation) в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ service.go # Business logic в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ order/ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ order.go в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ repository.go в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ service.go в”њв”Ђв”Ђ infrastructure/ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ database/ в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ postgres.go # Implements domain repository interfaces в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ migrations/ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ http/ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ server.go в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ handlers/ # Thin handlers calling domain services в””в”Ђв”Ђ application/ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ commands/ в””в”Ђв”Ђ queries/
example.note: Domain packages depend on nothing in infrastructure; infrastructure depends on domain interfaces. Dependency arrow points inward.
